testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of Microsoft Edge WebDriver only supports Microsoft Edge version 147 Current browser version is 150.0.4078.48 with binary path C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-2TO5TD6', ip: '10.98.245.206' Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, ms:edgeOptions: {args: [], binary: C:\Program Files (x86)\Micr..., extensions: []}}]}] at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:114) at testcase.name: testNewsletterSubscriptionDataDriven
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //span[@class='link__wrapper' and normalize-space()='Newsletters'] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version:
